creator: nork@ninth-nine.com
text:
On Sun, 9 Dec 2001 05:14:01 +0800
Ying-Chieh Liao <ijliao@FreeBSD.ORG> wrote:
> > 	But. I think that add AP_PORT?=apache13 to bsd.port.mk, and
> > 	only *_DEPENDS=${PREFIX}/sbin/apxs:${PORTSDIR}/www/${AP_PORT}
> > 	to each ports.
> maybe it's portmgr's pr ? :)

	Yes. Please.
	And, after report, I think that it might be a good idea to extend
	AP_PORT?=apache13 to www/apache13. Because of support for
	russian/apache13 etc...
